sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Excess Expenditure Short title
sections.text:
1. This Act may be cited as the Excess Expenditure Short title
Appropriation (2009) Act, 2012.

sections.heading: The expenditure on the services of the Republic during the Excess
sections.text:
2. The expenditure on the services of the Republic during the Excess
expenditure
financial year ended on 31st December, 2009, of moneys indicated
approved
in respect of the services in the third column of the Schedule, being
expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated for the services
by the Appropriation Act, 2009, and the Supplementary Act No. 10
of 2009
Appropriation (2009) Act, 2011, is hereby approved. Act No. 25
of 2011
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K1,000
